title: Coolbitz 2x Large Launcher Foam Glider, Hand Throw, Colorful Airplane Model Plane, Kids Children Toy, Outdoor Sports Flying, Toy Foam Aircraft for Girls and Boys, Fun Game 47 cm
features: FUN TO PLAY: This aeroplane is made of selected high-quality soft EPP foam, and it has a lightweight design, good elasticity, impact resistance, is suitable for toys of children as well as ensures the safety of children. It will not harm your kids even if the foam plane hit it during landing and they can enjoy their playtime.

DEVELOPING INTELLIGENCE: This toy helps to develop coordination and critical thinking skills in a practical way. Your child hand-eye coordination, observation, and sense of direction will also improve. Children will learn to launch and control aeroplanes by playing. Also, it will stay away from them from the computer, TV, and play with them in the playroom or outside for hours.

SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES: This koolbitz Flying Glider is not just for kids, the whole family can enjoy happy hours in open areas such as patio, sandy beach, grassland, yard, front door, park and other places with their kids. Playing with children helps to promote parent-child relationships. It is also beneficial to cultivate the practical ability, observation ability and sense of direction.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: Airplane Launch Foam Pack contains 2 colourful 18-inch airplanes. This launch plane consists of a fuselage and two wings that are easy to install and disassemble, just insert the wing and tail in the right place and launch up or horizontally, again and again, it will let you enjoy the interesting flight game immediately.

BEST GIFT: The ultimate gift idea for airplane lovers as well as great for airplane theme parties. Also, this will make a cool airplane glider for kids, when they are at family picnics, barbecue parties, air shows or just as a decoration for the children's room. You can also use these glider planes as prizes or rewards for good behaviour at home.
description: Product Description Introducing the Large Launcher Foam Glider, a fun-filled and engaging toy designed for kids and adults alike! This colorful hand-thrown airplane model plane is perfect for outdoor sports, flying activities, and family bonding moments. Specification: Colour: A random colour will be sent Airplane Toy Material: Expanded Polypropylene Toy Material: Plastic Age recommended: 3 Years and above Random Colour Launcher Crafted from premium EPP polymer material, our foam glider is lightweight at just 50 grams, offering flexibility, impact resistance, and durability without compromising safety. The eye-catching colours and intricate spot pattern on the aircraft fuselage cater to various preferences and add a touch of style to the foam glider. Easy to assemble and disassemble, this toy stimulates children's interest in DIY and promotes teamwork as they collaborate with friends during playtime. Kids Play Launcher Plane The Large Launcher Foam Glider is an ideal way to combine exercise and entertainment, as both children and adults can enjoy throwing and chasing the foam aircraft during outdoor adventures, themed parties, or simply in their backyard. This exciting activity encourages physical exercise and enhances children's motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Suitable for all ages, our foam glider plane is perfect for family outings, picnics, beach trips, park visits, and more, helping to strengthen parent-child relationships and cultivate practical abilities, observation skills, and a sense of direction. As the ultimate gift for aeroplane enthusiasts, this foam glider will surely delight kids and spark their imagination, making it a must-have addition to any toy collection. Bring endless joy and excitement to your child's playtime with the Large Launcher Foam Glider - the perfect combination of fun, learning, and outdoor adventure!
